7	// TC-001: Project overview (dashboard-level smoke)
8	//
9	// Since Stage 3.8, `/` redirects to `/nodes/<id>` and concrete project views
10	// live under `/nodes/<nodeId>/projects/<projectId>/...`. TC-001 mirrors the
11	// fixture-based pattern used in navigation.spec.ts: mock GraphQL for
12	// NodeInfo / Projects / ProjectQueueSummary, navigate into the fixture
13	// project, and assert the shell + project entry points render.
14	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
15	const TC001_NODE = { id: 'node-abc', name: 'Test Node' }
16	const TC001_PROJECT_ID = 'proj-1'
17	const TC001_PROJECTS = [
18	  { id: TC001_PROJECT_ID, name: 'Project Alpha', path: '/repos/alpha' },
19	  { id: 'proj-2', name: 'Project Beta', path: '/repos/beta' }
20	]
21	const TC001_BASE_URL = `/nodes/${TC001_NODE.id}/projects/${TC001_PROJECT_ID}`

23	async function mockProjectOverview(page: Page) {
24	  await page.route('/graphql', async (route) => {
25	    const body = route.request().postDataJSON() as { query: string }
26	    if (body.query.includes('NodeInfo')) {
27	      await route.fulfill({
28	        status: 200,
29	        contentType: 'application/json',
30	        body: JSON.stringify({ data: { nodeInfo: TC001_NODE } })
31	      })
32	    } else if (body.query.includes('Projects')) {
33	      await route.fulfill({
34	        status: 200,
35	        contentType: 'application/json',
36	        body: JSON.stringify({
37	          data: { projects: { edges: TC001_PROJECTS.map((p) => ({ node: p })) } }
38	        })
39	      })
40	    } else if (body.query.includes('ProjectQueueSummary') || body.query.includes('queueSummary')) {
41	      await route.fulfill({
42	        status: 200,
43	        contentType: 'application/json',
44	        body: JSON.stringify({
45	          data: { queueSummary: { ready: 3, blocked: 1, inProgress: 0 } }
46	        })
47	      })
48	    } else {
49	      await route.fulfill({
50	        status: 200,
51	        contentType: 'application/json',
52	        body: JSON.stringify({ data: {} })
53	      })
54	    }
55	  })
56	}

1	import { defineConfig } from '@playwright/test';
2	import path from 'node:path';
3	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
4	
5	const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
6	
7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.
11	
12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
14	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
15	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
16	
17	// Copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx binary from
18	// the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has no .git so
19	// FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the harness has
20	// no Tailscale dependency.
21	const bootCommand = [
22		`set -e`,
23		`TMP=$(mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX)`,
24		`cp -R "${FIXTURE_DIR}/." "$TMP/"`,
25		`(cd "${CLI_PKG_DIR}" && go build -o "$TMP/ddx" .)`,
26		`cd "$TMP"`,
27		`exec ./ddx server --tsnet=false --addr=127.0.0.1 --port=${PORT}`
28	].join(' && ');
29	
30	export default defineConfig({
31		webServer: {
32			command: `bash -c '${bootCommand}'`,
33			url: `${BASE_URL}/api/health`,
34			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true,
35			reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
36			timeout: 180_000,
37			stdout: 'pipe',
38			stderr: 'pipe'
39		},
40		use: {
41			baseURL: BASE_URL,
42			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true
43		},
44		testMatch: ['**/*.e2e.{ts,js}', 'e2e/**/*.spec.ts']
45	});

1	# Playwright e2e fixture workspace
2	
3	This directory provides a self-contained DDx workspace that the default
4	Playwright harness copies into a temp directory before booting the Go DDx
5	server. The fixture isolates e2e runs from the developer's home directory and
6	from the repository's live `.ddx/` state.
7	
8	Contents:
9	
10	- `.ddx/config.yaml` — minimal DDx config pointing at the local plugin library.
11	- `.ddx/beads.jsonl` — open, closed, and blocked beads so the bead API endpoints
12	  return non-empty data.
13	- `.ddx/plugins/ddx/` — minimal personas, prompts, and templates so the document
14	  and persona endpoints have something to list.
15	- `docs/` — small docs library for the document graph endpoint.
16	
17	The fixture is read-only; the harness copies it to a `mktemp -d` workspace at
18	boot so test runs do not mutate these files. Do not reference user-home paths
19	from anything in this directory.

298		s.mu.Lock()

301		now := time.Now().UTC()

303

307				// Test-dir pollution — drop unconditionally.
308				continue
309			}
310			_, err := os.Stat(p.Path)
311			if err == nil {
312				// Path exists — clear any stale tombstone.
313				p.Unreachable = false
314				p.TombstonedAt = nil
315				kept = append(kept, p)
316				continue
317			}
318			// Path doesn't exist.

320				// Tombstoned >24 h ago — drop the entry.
321				continue
322			}
323			if !p.Unreachable {
324				// First time marking unreachable.
325				p.Unreachable = true
326				p.TombstonedAt = &now
327			}

329		}
330		s.Projects = kept

332	}

	const PROJECTS_QUERY = gql`

			projects {
				edges {
					node {

						name
						path
					}
				}
			}
		}
	`;

	interface ProjectNode {

		name: string;
		path: string;
	}

	interface ProjectsResult {
		projects: {
			edges: Array<{ node: ProjectNode }>;
		};
	}

	let projects = $state<ProjectNode[]>([]);
	let loading = $state(true);

	onMount(async () => {
		const client = createClient();
		const data = await client.request<ProjectsResult>(PROJECTS_QUERY);
		projects = data.projects.edges.map((e) => e.node);
		loading = false;
	});

	function handleChange(event: Event) {
		const select = event.target as HTMLSelectElement;
		const projectId = select.value;
		if (!projectId) return;

		const project = projects.find((p) => p.id === projectId);
		if (!project) return;

		projectStore.set({ id: project.id, name: project.name, path: project.path });

		const nodeId = nodeStore.value?.id;
		if (nodeId) {
			goto(`/nodes/${nodeId}/projects/${projectId}`);
		}
	}
